Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Pltf To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Francisco Gutierrez for plaintiff and moving party: John F. Rothmann

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff John Rothmann's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed.
Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection no later than 5:00 p.m. January 12, 2007. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $490 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
